name: place-type-home-concept
title: 新方向产品收敛：多地点类型与 Home 概念
description: 将既有头脑风暴中的酒馆→多地点类型、Home 概念、用户角色扩展和任务/玩法系统收敛成可评审的产品边界与后续实施路线。
creator: lijin
notes:
2026-04-27: Produced product-direction convergence draft for Place-first, Tavern-compatible roadmap. No code or global schema/docs changed. Decision doc keeps Tavern as current stable implementation model, requires real-coordinate Home anchoring with privacy controls, limits Home visits to controlled access, defers member relationship graph/school sync, and keeps gameplay as place-local non-RPG interaction. Human approval required before global docs or schema implementation.

2026-04-27 correction: Child 04-27-place-type-discovery-mvp only completed the frontend derived discovery filter slice. The Place/Home roadmap remains deferred for backend schema, WORLD_SCHEMA updates, Home MVP, family members, school sync, and relationship graph; these must not be reported as completed without separate Trellis tasks and verification.

2026-04-27 follow-up: Child 04-27-place-home-full-mvp completed the previously deferred backend/schema/Home/member/school relationship MVP with tests/docs/spec verification. Earlier completion-integrity rule still applies: future deferred items must have their own concrete task and verification before being called done.
